===Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon===
Professor Kukui's story in Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon is nearly identical to that of Sun and Moon, with the only differences being the start and ending of the player's adventure.

====Melemele Island====
In {{g|Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon}}, Professor Kukui gives the player their first partner Pokémon on {{rt|1|Alola}}. 

====Mount Lanakila====
The Professor greets the player at the gates to the now-completed Pokémon League resting on top of Mount Lanakila. He congratulates the player for completing all trials and grand trials and remembers the time when the player chose their first Pokémon, to which the player asks if he is cold (but his soul keeps him heated). Kukui welcomes the player to the league, explaining how the tip of Mount Lanakila was always a place of respect and where every island challenge is finished, the closest place to the sun and moon. Once the player enters the League gates, Kukui explains how the Elite Four challenge works, and wishes the player luck.

Upon defeating all four members of the Elite Four, the player makes their way to the Champion's chamber and sits on the throne. However, when the player sits on the Champion's throne after defeating all four members of the Elite Four, Kukui will joke about being the one who will be the last opponent the player must face to rightfully take their place as Champion before he presents [[Hau]] as the final opponent. After Hau's defeat, Kukui congratulates the player, and names them the first ever Champion of the Alola Pokémon League, entering them in the [[Hall of Fame]]. His dream of having an established Pokémon League and champion in the Alola has been accomplished and wishes to have a festival back in Iki Town, for the player's accomplishment. Professor Kukui joins the party at Iki Town, celebrating the trainer's victory at becoming Alola's strongest Pokémon Trainer asks them to show off their team to the others.

Like in the original games, Kukui can be battled during a Title Defense battle and he uses the final Evolution of the first partner Pokémon the player's choice is weak to. He can also appear as an opponent at the [[Battle Tree]].
